caption: A man wearing a grey baseball cap and a black t-shirt is featured in a video set against a backdrop of sports memorabilia and "JASYPS" branding. He is positioned to the right of a screen displaying a list of Major League Baseball teams, including "5. COLORADO ROCKIES" and "6. DETROIT TIGERS." The interface includes a timestamp "2020-07-20 07:59:37 UTC" and the message "You have randomized this list 5 times." Red "Subscribe" buttons are visible on the screen. As the video progresses, the list of teams updates, and the text changes to "You have randomized this list 6 times" with a timestamp of "2020-07-20 07:59:38 UTC." The man remains in the same position, looking toward the camera, while the digital interface on the left updates its contents. The "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo is prominently displayed throughout the sequence.
